content.company_description: We are Kometa.Games, a mobile game studio focused on creating engaging and highly polished casual experiences. The team specializes in addictive core loops and player-driven progression. With a strong emphasis on gameplay feel and retention, Kometa.Games builds games that are easy to pick up and hard to put down.
content.company_description_2: Kometa.Games is a trademark of © Yadarko Trading Ltd

offers.title: Adaptable schedule
offers.text: If the default working hours don’t suit you, we’re happy to adjust them to better fit your needs

offers.title: Professional growth
offers.text: We offer competitive compensation with regular reviews, personalized development plans, and opportunities to explore new career paths

offers.title: Work from anywhere
offers.text: Join our team remotely from any location worldwide

offers.title: Supportive team
offers.text: We value transparency and a positive environment, with accessible leadership and open communication across the company

apps.text_1: Welcome to Age of Coins: Master of Spins — the ultimate spin & raid adventure! Spin the wheel, collect coins, attack enemies, and build your dream empire in this addictive coin game.
apps.text_2: Play with millions of players around the world, climb the leaderboard, and become the true spin master of the ages!

apps.text_1: Try the ultimate roguelike archer RPG in a magical world full of fantasy battles and epic loot!
apps.text_2: Enter a roleplaying adventure, where your archer hero fights monsters, explores dungeons, upgrades weapons and abilities, and defeats powerful bosses.

requirements: A portfolio showcasing UI work for game projects with casual graphics;
Strong artistic skills in creating icons, banners, and UI elements in a casual style.
responsibilities: Creating UI for mobile game projects with casual-style graphics based on provided specifications;
Designing layouts and preparing state previews;
Maintaining a library of UI elements.
advantages: Option to work under a Cyprus-based contract with salary tied to EUR, or as an independent contractor (with vacation/holidays aligned to standard labor practices);
An experienced team with a strong track record of successful releases;
Remote work with a flexible schedule.

footer.cookie_notice: This website does not use cookies
